meta.title: AI Optical Sorting System Brochure | WEI LAN Resources
meta.description: Review what the WEI LAN AI Optical Sorting System Brochure covers for PET, HDPE, PP, and mixed recyclable plastic sorting projects.

bodyHtml:
Brochure

AI Optical Sorting System Brochure

A product overview for teams evaluating AI recognition and optical sorting for PET bottles, HDPE bottles, PP, and mixed recyclable plastics.

Type: Product brochure Updated: 2026-06-30 Buyer fit: Plastic recycling projects Review time: 10 min

What this resource covers

  • Typical recyclable plastic inputs and sorting categories
  • System positioning for PET, HDPE, PP, and mixed plastic sorting
  • Throughput, footprint, and automation discussion points
  • Questions to prepare before requesting a plastic sorting proposal

When to use this resource

Use this brochure when you need to compare AI optical sorting with manual sorting or traditional separation methods for a plastic recycling line.

Request this resource

Related resources

Plan a plastic sorting project

Review the product page, checklist, and contact form before sending material details.
